title: Earthquake Safety and Preparedness Guide
narration: If shaking starts, drop to your knees, cover your head and neck, and hold on to a sturdy table. Do not try to run.
visual: Simple 2D icon of a person dropping under a sturdy desk, holding onto one of its legs.
